name: 1606 CORP.
business: The Company develops and licenses AI chatbots specifically designed for the CBD industry and for public companies. It has entered into a purchase agreement to acquire a power generation facility and warehouse for potential data center use. The Company has no revenue from these new operations as of December 31, 2025.

exposures.sentence: We develop AI chatbot s that are specifically designed to the industry and products for a retailer or brands.
The Company intends to utilize the Property as a behind-the-meter captive power asset to support AI and data center infrastructure operations.
The site includes a 55-megawatt power generation facility and a 50,000-square-foot climate-controlled warehouse that the Company believes is suitable for data center deployment.

catalysts.sentence: Closing is scheduled for April 15, 2026, subject to customary closing conditions.

tamClaims.claim: The global artificial intelligence market was valued at $428 billion in 2022 and is projected to reach $2.25 trillion by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: The global artificial intelligence market has seen remarkable growth, valued at $428 billion in 2022 and projected to reach $2.25 trillion by 2030.

tamClaims.claim: The global CBD market size was valued at $6.4 billion in 2022 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 16.2% from 2023 to 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: The global CBD market size was valued at $6.4 billion in 2022 and is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 16.2% from 2023 to 2030.
